basic_details.job_title: APSC Junior Manager (APGCL) Recruitment 2026: 31 Posts, Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Assam Public Service Commission (APSC) has invited online applications from Indian Citizens for 31 Junior Manager posts under the Assam Power Generation Corporation Limited (APGCL), across the disciplines of Electrical, Mechanical, Information Technology, Instrumentation and Civil. This recruitment is issued vide Advertisement No. 10/2026 (Memo No. 20 PSC/DR-21/1/2026-27), dated 16 July 2026. Eligible diploma holders can apply online at apscrecruitment.in from 22 July 2026 to 21 August 2026.

application_fee.details: To avail the fee relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/MOBC/BPL, candidates must produce a certificate of the claimed category issued by the competent authority Applications without the prescribed fee will not be considered and will be summarily rejected, with no representation entertained against such rejection Fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances, nor can the fee be held in reserve for any other examination or selection

age_limit.details: Candidates should not be less than 21 years and not more than 38 years of age as on 01-01-2026. | Age will be calculated based on the Class-X/Class-XII Examination Admit Card/Pass Certificate/Marksheet issued by a recognized Central/State Board/Council, where the Date of Birth is clearly reflected. No other document will be accepted for age proof.

qualification.details: The candidate must be an Indian Citizen as defined in Articles 5 to 8 of the Constitution of India The candidate must be a permanent resident of Assam As domicile proof, candidates must upload a valid Permanent Resident Certificate issued in Assam for educational purpose, or an Employment Exchange Registration Certificate, which will be treated as proof of residency | Full-time Diploma course in Engineering from any Government/Government-recognized/AICTE-approved Polytechnic or Institution Course duration must be a minimum of 3 years after HSLC or equivalent, or 2 years (Base) + 2 years (Diploma) from a Government/recognized/AICTE-approved institution Minimum 60% marks required in the qualifying examination of the Diploma course (minimum 50% for SC and ST candidates)

salary_details.details: Pay scale, grade pay, and other allowances will be as admissible to Assam State Government employees from time to time.

selection_process: 2 Jorhat Golaghat, Dibrugarh, Jorhat, Majuli, Charaideo, Sivasagar, Tinsukia
3 Nagaon Dima Hasao, Hojai, Nagaon, Morigaon, Karbi Anglong, West Karbi Anglong
4 Tezpur Biswanath, Dhemaji, Lakhimpur, Sonitpur, Udalguri
5 Kokrajhar Bongaigaon, Chirang, Dhubri, Goalpara, Kokrajhar, South Salmara
6 Guwahati Barpeta, Baksa, Kamrup, Kamrup (Metro), Nalbari, Darrang, Bajali, Tamulpur
The selection procedure will be notified later
followed by a corrigendum/addendum if required. The Commission will decide the provision for selection for any post/service considering its status
or the number of applications received. The Commission may also decide to conduct examinations/tests zone-wise
depending on the number of candidates against the districts in each zone.
The Commission has the discretion to reduce or increase the number of zones depending on the number of candidates.
how_to_apply: Visit the APSC Recruitment website: https://apscrecruitment.in
If not already registered, click on the 'Register Here' link and complete the One Time Registration (OTR) process with the required basic details
Register with a valid and active email address and mobile number
After registration, log in using the registered email/mobile number and password
Provide the required registration details as asked in the form
Read the eligibility criteria and other relevant details carefully before applying; mandatory fields are marked with an asterisk (*)
Upload the required documents/certificates (Date of Birth, Educational Qualifications, caste/category, etc.) in PDF format, along with a recent photograph and signature
Fill all details carefully, tick the declaration checkbox to enable the Preview option, and confirm that uploaded documents are clear and legible
Click 'Proceed to Pay' to continue, or 'Cancel' to make corrections - no editing is allowed after final submission
Pay the prescribed application fee as applicable to your category
Take a printout of the submitted Online Application Form and retain the hard copy for future reference

Candidates note: before filling the application form, the required certificates relating to age, caste, and minimum educational qualification will be fetched from the OTR profile. Candidates should update their OTR profile if any additional documents need to be uploaded in support of the advertised post.
important_instructions: Only online applications through apscrecruitment.in will be accepted; no other means or mode of application will be considered Applicants may also fill their form through Common Service Centres (CSCs) if they do not have debit card/internet banking facilities Fee once paid will not be refunded; in case of a double debit for the same transaction, the bank will automatically refund the excess within 5-7 working days Applications will not be considered valid unless the fee payment is completed Candidates' admission at all stages of selection is purely provisional and subject to scrutiny; if found ineligible at any stage, their candidature will be cancelled by the Commission No request for withdrawal of candidature after submission will be entertained under any circumstances No candidate will be allowed to change their claimed category/sub-category at any stage of the selection process Furnishing wrong, erroneous, or incorrect information may lead to disqualification for a period specified by the Commission; false declarations will lead to rejection and possible penalty as per prevailing rules Candidates must be in sound bodily health and, if selected, must undergo medical examination as required by the Government Canvassing in any form will disqualify a candidate Candidates will be informed of the final result through the APSC website/newspaper; interim enquiries about the result will not be attended to The Commission does not defray travelling or other expenses of candidates summoned for interview

content_sections.heading: APSC Junior Manager Recruitment 2026: Quick Overview

rows.event: Last Date for Payment of Application Fee

content_sections.heading: APSC Junior Manager Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: The candidate must be an Indian Citizen as defined in Articles 5 to 8 of the Constitution of India The candidate must be a permanent resident of Assam As domicile proof, candidates must upload a valid Permanent Resident Certificate issued in Assam for educational purpose, or an Employment Exchange Registration Certificate, which will be treated as proof of residency Full-time Diploma course in Engineering from any Government/Government-recognized/AICTE-approved Polytechnic or Institution Course duration must be a minimum of 3 years after HSLC or equivalent, or 2 years (Base) + 2 years (Diploma) from a Government/recognized/AICTE-approved institution Minimum 60% marks required in the qualifying examination of the Diploma course (minimum 50% for SC and ST candidates)

rows.required_diploma_specialization: Diploma in Electrical Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering
Diploma in Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology / Computer Technology

content_sections.heading: APSC Junior Manager Age Limit
content_sections.text: Candidates should not be less than 21 years and not more than 38 years of age as on 01-01-2026 . Age will be calculated based on the Class-X/Class-XII Examination Admit Card/Pass Certificate/Marksheet issued by a recognized Central/State Board/Council, where the Date of Birth is clearly reflected. No other document will be accepted for age proof.

rows.relaxation: 3 years (upto 41 years), as per Govt. Notification No. ABP.6/2016/9 dated Dispur, 25 April 2018
10 years, irrespective of SC/ST/OBC/UR category, as per Govt. Memorandum No. ABP 144/95/121 dated Dispur, 28 October 2015
Maximum age 50 years as on 01-01-2026 for Unreserved category, relaxable further by 3 years for OBC/MOBC and 5 years for SC/ST candidates

content_sections.heading: APSC Junior Manager Salary
content_sections.text: Pay scale, grade pay, and other allowances will be as admissible to Assam State Government employees from time to time.

content_sections.heading: APSC Junior Manager Application Fee
content_sections.text: To avail the fee relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/MOBC/BPL, candidates must produce a certificate of the claimed category issued by the competent authority Applications without the prescribed fee will not be considered and will be summarily rejected, with no representation entertained against such rejection Fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances, nor can the fee be held in reserve for any other examination or selection

content_sections.heading: APSC Junior Manager Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection procedure will be notified later, followed by a corrigendum/addendum if required. The Commission will decide the provision for selection for any post/service considering its status, cadre, grade, or the number of applications received. The Commission may also decide to conduct examinations/tests zone-wise, depending on the number of candidates against the districts in each zone. The Commission has the discretion to reduce or increase the number of zones depending on the number of candidates.

rows.districts_covered: Golaghat, Dibrugarh, Jorhat, Majuli, Charaideo, Sivasagar, Tinsukia
Dima Hasao, Hojai, Nagaon, Morigaon, Karbi Anglong, West Karbi Anglong
Bongaigaon, Chirang, Dhubri, Goalpara, Kokrajhar, South Salmara
Barpeta, Baksa, Kamrup, Kamrup (Metro), Nalbari, Darrang, Bajali, Tamulpur

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Class-X/Class-XII Examination Admit Card/Pass Certificate/Marksheet clearly indicating Date of Birth Certificates and mark sheets of all examinations from HSLC onwards up to the level of the qualifying (Diploma) examination - each semester/year mark sheet plus the final pass certificate Valid Permanent Resident Certificate (Assam) for educational purpose, or Employment Exchange Registration Certificate, as domicile proof Caste certificate issued by the Government of Assam, for candidates seeking reservation as SC/ST/OBC/MOBC, from the competent authority BPL certificate issued by the Government of Assam, wherever necessary Certificate of Benchmark Disability of 40% or more, issued by the competent authority, for PwBD category candidates Certificate of employment against the applied post, issued by the competent authority, for candidates already in regular Government service No Objection Certificate (NOC), for candidates seeking pay protection or continuation in service Experience certificate, wherever necessary Declaration Form-A regarding the Small Family Norms, as per Govt. Notification No. ABP.69/2019/17 dated Dispur, 6 November 2019 (downloadable from www.apsc.nic.in, Forms & Downloads section) Recent photograph (50 KB–200 KB, not older than 3 months) and signature (50 KB–200 KB) Identity proof such as PAN Card, Driving Licence, Passport, educational institution ID card, Voter ID Card, or Aadhaar Card, to be produced at the time of screening/written test and interview All required documents/certificates must be uploaded in PDF format, with file size not exceeding 4 MB, legible in print, and scanned at 200 dpi in greyscale (recommended).

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for APSC Junior Manager Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the APSC Recruitment website: https://apscrecruitment.in If not already registered, click on the 'Register Here' link and complete the One Time Registration (OTR) process with the required basic details Register with a valid and active email address and mobile number After registration, log in using the registered email/mobile number and password Provide the required registration details as asked in the form Read the eligibility criteria and other relevant details carefully before applying; mandatory fields are marked with an asterisk (*) Upload the required documents/certificates (Date of Birth, Educational Qualifications, caste/category, etc.) in PDF format, along with a recent photograph and signature Fill all details carefully, tick the declaration checkbox to enable the Preview option, and confirm that uploaded documents are clear and legible Click 'Proceed to Pay' to continue, or 'Cancel' to make corrections - no editing is allowed after final submission Pay the prescribed application fee as applicable to your category Take a printout of the submitted Online Application Form and retain the hard copy for future reference Candidates note: before filling the application form, the required certificates relating to age, caste, and minimum educational qualification will be fetched from the OTR profile. Candidates should update their OTR profile if any additional documents need to be uploaded in support of the advertised post.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only online applications through apscrecruitment.in will be accepted; no other means or mode of application will be considered Applicants may also fill their form through Common Service Centres (CSCs) if they do not have debit card/internet banking facilities Fee once paid will not be refunded; in case of a double debit for the same transaction, the bank will automatically refund the excess within 5-7 working days Applications will not be considered valid unless the fee payment is completed Candidates' admission at all stages of selection is purely provisional and subject to scrutiny; if found ineligible at any stage, their candidature will be cancelled by the Commission No request for withdrawal of candidature after submission will be entertained under any circumstances No candidate will be allowed to change their claimed category/sub-category at any stage of the selection process Furnishing wrong, erroneous, or incorrect information may lead to disqualification for a period specified by the Commission; false declarations will lead to rejection and possible penalty as per prevailing rules Candidates must be in sound bodily health and, if selected, must undergo medical examination as required by the Government Canvassing in any form will disqualify a candidate Candidates will be informed of the final result through the APSC website/newspaper; interim enquiries about the result will not be attended to The Commission does not defray travelling or other expenses of candidates summoned for interview

faq.question: Q1. How many Junior Manager posts are available in APGCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 31 posts in total - 12 Electrical, 6 Mechanical, 2 Information Technology, 2 Instrumentation, and 9 Civil.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for APSC Junior Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application closes on 21 August 2026, with the last date for fee payment being 23 August 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What qualification is required for APSC Junior Manager posts?
faq.answer: A full-time Diploma in Engineering (in the relevant discipline) from a Government/Government-recognized/AICTE-approved institution, with a minimum of 60% marks (50% for SC/ST candidates) in the qualifying examination.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for APSC Junior Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 21 and 38 years as on 1 January 2026, with relaxations available for SC/ST, OBC/MOBC, PwBD, and Ex-Servicemen categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for APSC Junior Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: ₹297.20 for General category, ₹197.20 for OBC/MOBC, and ₹47.20 for SC/ST/BPL/PwBD (the latter amount being only the CSC-SPV processing fee).

faq.question: Q6. What is the pay scale for APGCL Junior Manager?
faq.answer: ₹25,000/- to ₹92,000/- per month, with a Grade Pay of ₹12,100/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is domicile of Assam required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates must be permanent residents of Assam and must upload a valid Permanent Resident Certificate or Employment Exchange Registration Certificate as domicile proof.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for APSC Junior Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification states that the selection procedure will be notified later, possibly followed by a corrigendum or addendum, and that examinations/tests may be conducted zone-wise depending on the number of candidates.
